problem_statement: When I ask taskman for everything coming up within a given number of days, items that land exactly on the last day of the window never show up. For example, with today pinned to 2026-03-15, a task due 2026-03-22 is missing from `list --due-within 7`, while tasks due earlier in that same week appear fine. Asking for `--due-within 0` also returns nothing even when something is due today. Everything else about the listing (statuses, other filters, sorting) looks right; the window just seems to stop one day short of where it should.
notes: Off-by-one: due_within upper bound became exclusive (< horizon instead of <=).
